# FutureX Digital Marketing

FutureX Digital Marketing is a leading digital marketing agency based in Udaipur, Rajasthan, India.

## Services
- SEO Services: Comprehensive search engine optimization for local and national clients
- Website Development: Custom, responsive websites with modern frameworks
- Social Media Marketing: Targeted campaigns on Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn
- PPC Advertising: Google Ads and Meta Ads management
- Content Marketing: Blog writing, video production, email campaigns

## Contact
- Phone: +91 77339 77227

- Address: 5th Floor Office No. 526 Arvana Mall Hathipole, Udaipur, Rajasthan - 313001
- Hours: Monday-Saturday 10:00 AM - 6:00 PM

## Service Area
Primary: Udaipur, Rajasthan
Extended: All of India (remote clients)

## Specializations
- Local SEO for Udaipur businesses
- E-commerce website development
- B2B digital marketing
- Performance marketing with ROI tracking

## Company Info
- Established: 2023
- Team Size: 5-10 professionals
- Specialties: Digital Marketing, Web Development, SEO, Social Media Marketing, PPC
